---
title: "Mathematical Notes"
description: "Expository notes and working calculations in geometric analysis."
page-layout: full
body-classes: notes-page
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: sidebar.html
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.md"
    - "!tex/README.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 100
---

::: {.notes-intro}
::: {.notes-intro-copy}
<p class="notes-kicker">GEOMETRIC ANALYSIS · EXPOSITORY NOTES</p>

<p class="notes-intro-title">$e^{i\pi}+1=0$</p>

Short notes on geometric PDE, minimal surfaces, variational methods, and the calculations behind them.
:::
:::

## Browse Notes

Expository notes and working calculations. Use the search box or topic labels to browse the collection.
